name_en: Top-tier replica, changed code chip M13450
name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changed code chip M13450
This Dauphine Soft medium bag features glossy leather outlining Monogram canvas trim, creating a trendy choice for day and night. The LV lettering appears on the flap, complementing the removable chain. A zippered interior pocket provides organized storage for daily needs.
17 x 9 x 24 cm
(H x W x D)
Sheepskin
Calfskin and Monogram canvas trim
Canvas lining
Metalware
LV magnetic closure
Zippered interior pocket
Fits smartphone, keys, earphones, Rosalie coin purse, and lipstick
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 29.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 49.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 26.0 cm
